pendingTranslations.Sessions: 4 × $45 = $180. Paid via card: Sessions: 4 × $45 = $180. Paid via card ending 4242 on Oct 28. Receipt available for download.

pendingTranslations.Week 1: Base building. 4 easy runs (40-5: Week 1: Base building. 4 easy runs (40-50 min), 1 long run (75 min), 2 strength sessions. Focus on consistent aerobic effort and form drills.
